title: 117. Populating Next Right Pointers in Each Node II
question:
Given a binary tree

struct Node {
  int val;
  Node *left;
  Node *right;
  Node *next;
}

Populate each next pointer to point to its next right node. If there is no next right node, the next pointer should be set to NULL.

Initially, all next pointers are set to NULL.

 

Example:

Input: {"$id":"1","left":{"$id":"2","left":{"$id":"3","left":null,"next":null,"right":null,"val":4},"next":null,"right":{"$id":"4","left":null,"next":null,"right":null,"val":5},"val":2},"next":null,"right":{"$id":"5","left":null,"next":null,"right":{"$id":"6","left":null,"next":null,"right":null,"val":7},"val":3},"val":1}

Output: {"$id":"1","left":{"$id":"2","left":{"$id":"3","left":null,"next":{"$id":"4","left":null,"next":{"$id":"5","left":null,"next":null,"right":null,"val":7},"right":null,"val":5},"right":null,"val":4},"next":{"$id":"6","left":null,"next":null,"right":{"$ref":"5"},"val":3},"right":{"$ref":"4"},"val":2},"next":null,"right":{"$ref":"6"},"val":1}

Explanation: Given the above binary tree (Figure A), your function should populate each next pointer to point to its next right node, just like in Figure B.

 

Note:

  • You may only use constant extra space.
  • Recursive approach is fine, implicit stack space does not count as extra space for this problem.
code: \u0022\u0022\u0022\u000A# Definition for a Node.\u000Aclass Node(object):\u000A    def __init__(self, val, left, right, next):\u000A        self.val \u003D val\u000A        self.left \u003D left\u000A        self.right \u003D right\u000A        self.next \u003D next\u000A\u0022\u0022\u0022\u000Aclass Solution(object):\u000A    def connect(self, root):\u000A        \u000A        cur \u003D root\u000A        next_head \u003D next_prev \u003D None\u000A        while cur:\u000A            if not next_head:\u000A                next_head \u003D next_prev \u003D cur.left or cur.right\u000A                \u000A            if cur.left and next_head !\u003D cur.left:\u000A                next_prev.next, next_prev \u003D cur.left, cur.left\u000A                \u000A            if cur.right and next_head !\u003D cur.right:\u000A                next_prev.next, next_prev \u003D cur.right, cur.right\u000A            \u000A            if not cur.next:\u000A                cur \u003D next_head\u000A                next_head \u003D next_prev \u003D None\u000A            else:\u000A                cur \u003D cur.next\u000A                    \u000A        return root
